sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22783" key="grammoto/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γραμμοτόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n22783.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mother of lines</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέλασμα</foreign>, of the leaden plummet, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.63</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Damoch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
